description: Sub-district and village level geographic data
Core establishment counts including mixed-use categories
DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS (
	FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	LOCATION_ID BIGINT,
	TIME_ID BIGINT,
	SECTOR_ID BIGINT,
	TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FOREIGN KEY (LOCATION_ID) REFERENCES DIM_LOCATION (LOCATION_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (TIME_ID) REFERENCES DIM_TIME (TIME_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (SECTOR_ID) REFERENCES DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY (SECTOR_ID)
);
